items.name: Mask of the Betrayer
items.description: A cursed wooden mask that whispers promises of power to its wearers. Those who succumb to its temptation are consumed by a desire to sow discontent and destruction, driving a wedge between even the closest of allies. The mask's victims are left with nothing but their own regret and the knowledge of their deceitful deeds.

items.name: Green OV-1C "Marksman" Goggles
items.description:
OV-1 "C" Variant offers an upgraded sensor package, with a direct uplink to command modules assigned to you. Essentially, whatever you see, can be instantly uploaded to your team leader, or command element with a push of a button. However it is not recommended to travel alone with this system, as it is incredibly expensive...
